title: Add SSRF prevention and webhook endpoint validation
source: OWASP LLM06 Excessive Agency + AI Agent Security Cheat Sheet
description: SSRF prevention in security_utils.py is commented out. Roro webhook endpoints from env vars have no private IP validation. URL validation regex is overly permissive.
proposed_changes: Uncomment and enhance SSRF prevention with private IP deny-list. Add validate_webhook_endpoint(). Apply in roro_events.py before HTTP requests.
